title: Seed INFLUENCES Edges
description: Schema for the proxy-data-derived INFLUENCES edge seed per FR-039. The artifact is NOT a hand-authored JSON file; it is produced by the foundational seeding pipeline (tasks Phase 2) that intersects QCEW union density (Workers' Congress), Natural Earth AIANNH polygons (Decolonial), and presidential election results (Restorationist) with the Detroit tri-county H3 res-7 hex grid. The Liberal-Imperial entries are computed as the complement clamped to the configured cap (BalkanizationDefines.liberal_imperial_influence_cap, default 0.4). Determinism: given the same upstream data + seed RNG, the same edge set is produced byte-identically (per FR-044 + SC-011).

computed_at_iso.description: Timestamp the seed was computed (informational; not used at runtime).

proxy_data_provenance.description: Source identifiers per Constitution III.4. Each entry MUST appear in data-catalog.yaml.

qcew_vintage.description: QCEW annual vintage used for union-density computation (e.g., '2024' for 2024-Q4 release).

election_source.description: Source of presidential-election results. MIT Election Lab is preferred but requires v2.6.4 catalog amendment; until amended, fall back to the Census Bureau presidential-election fixture.

election_year.description: Year of the presidential election used.

faction_id.description: Must reference a Faction.id in seed_factions.json.

territory_id.description: H3 res-7 hex ID for in-scope territories, or 'canada' / 'rest_of_usa' boundary node IDs.

influence_level.description: Per-hex influence; for FAC_WORKERS_CONGRESS = union-employment-share prorated by LODES residential density; for FAC_DECOLONIAL = AIANNH intersection area; for FAC_RESTORATIONIST = Republican vote share prorated by LODES; for FAC_LIBERAL_IMPERIAL = complement clamped to liberal_imperial_influence_cap.
